rows.description: Compotus Thoma Hixton, Rectoris, a 2do die Novis 1790 ad eundem diem revolutum 1791.
rows.notes: Description from gemini-flash is visually more accurate, specifically 'Thoma', 'Hixton', and 'revolutum'. Both agreed on row_type and empty amounts.
rows.section_header: Compotus Thoma Hixton, Rectoris, a 2do die Novis 1790 ad eundem diem revolutum 1791.

rows.notes: Description 'Am. Recepta' from gemini-flash is visually correct. gpt-5-mini's note was more detailed, but its transcription was less accurate here. Both agreed on row_type and empty amounts.

Description 'Llwett Rect. Vide Recepta varia' from gemini-flash is visually more accurate. The 'Llwett Rect.' part is clearer than 'Sett. Act.'. Considered an 'entry' as it's a specific item, even without an amount, rather than a broad section header. Both agreed on empty amounts.
rows.english_description: Receipt relating to the Llwett rectory; see various receipts.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt relating to the Llwett rectory; amount not stated.

rows.notes: Amounts (13, 7, 6, 0.5) and description ('Hidon') from gemini-flash are visually accurate. The first digit for pounds is clearly '1', not '7'. Both extractors correctly identified the fraction as 0.5.
rows.english_description: Annual rent from the Hidon mill.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent from Hidon Mill, amounting to £13 7s 6.5d.

rows.notes: Amounts (6, 13, 9, 0.75) are consistent between both extractors and visually accurate. Description 'Gart. Sadler' from gemini-flash is visually more accurate; the initial 'r' is clear.
rows.english_description: Annual rent from Gart. Sadler.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent from Gart. Sadler, amounting to £6 13s 9.75d.

rows.notes: Amounts (24, 18, 4, 0.25) and description ('Gart. Pritchett') from gemini-flash are visually accurate. The pence digit is '4', and the fraction is '¼'.
rows.english_description: Payment from Gart. Pritchett covering four years.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment from Gart. Pritchett for four years, amounting to £24 18s 4.25d.

rows.description: Tintenhall Rhode pro an. nunc J. Beaton

rows.english_description: Annual rent for Tintenhall Rhode, now held by J. Beaton.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent for Tintenhall Rhode, now held by J. Beaton, amounting to £0 18s 7d.

rows.notes: Full consensus on description, amounts (17, 0, 11, ''), and row_type. Visually confirmed.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt for Clifton Ferry for three years, due at Michaelmas 1789, amounting to £17 0s 11d.

rows.notes: Amounts (119, 4, 4, '') are consistent and visually accurate. Description 'J. Newt. Rect.' from gemini-flash is visually more accurate, the initial letter is clearly a 'J' and the last word is 'Rect.'.
rows.english_description: Annual rent from J. Newt.'s rectory (J. Newton).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent from J. Newt.'s rectory, amounting to £119 4s 4d.

rows.notes: Amounts (1, 19, 11, '') are consistent and visually accurate. Description 'J. Newt. Tenem.' from gemini-flash is visually more accurate, consistent with the 'J. Newt.' abbreviation from the previous entry.
rows.english_description: Annual rent from J. Newt.'s tenement.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent from J. Newt.'s tenement, amounting to £1 19s 11d.

rows.notes: Description ('Ineb. R. v. Rec. varia') and empty amounts from gemini-flash are visually accurate. gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned the amounts from the subsequent row to this entry, representing a row-level misalignment.
rows.english_description: Various receipts (abbreviation unclear in transcription).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Various receipts (abbreviation unclear); amount not stated.

rows.notes: Description ('Chace Hill ad Mich. 1790.') and amounts (31, 7, 10, 0.5) from gemini-flash are visually accurate. gpt-5-mini's Row 11 *amounts* matched this visual row, but its description was incorrect for this row, indicating a row-shifting error.
rows.english_description: Rent from Chace Hill due at Michaelmas 1790.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent from Chace Hill due at Michaelmas 1790, amounting to £31 7s 10.5d.

rows.notes: Description ('Bensington pro an.') and amounts (5, 4, 9, 0.75) from gemini-flash are visually accurate. While gpt-5-mini eventually provided correct data for this row (its Row 13), gemini-flash maintained correct row alignment throughout.
rows.english_description: Annual rent from Bensington.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent from Bensington, amounting to £5 4s 9.75d.

rows.notes: Amounts for pounds, pence and fraction (8, 5, 0.5) are consistent. Shillings ('14') from gemini-flash are visually accurate; gpt-5-mini incorrectly read '4'. Description 'Yardn. Tenem. pro d?' from gemini-flash is visually more accurate, with 'Yardn.' consistent with prior entries and 'd?' reflecting the ambiguity well.

rows.description: Thorp pro dim. an. ad Mich. Not recd
rows.notes: Description 'Thorp pro dim. an. ad Mich. Not recd' and empty amounts from gpt-5-mini are visually accurate. The instruction 'Not recd.' is clear, and there are no numerical values in the amount columns, only dashes. gemini-flash misread 'Not recd.' and incorrectly assigned amounts.
rows.english_description: Half-year rent from Thorp due at Michaelmas; noted as not received.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Half-year rent from Thorp due at Michaelmas (not received); amount not stated.
